ask: What should I look at first when I come back tomorrow?
response_text: Workspace is clean — the only actionable thread tomorrow is the Q3 pricing decision: the $19 tier is held until August but the revisit criteria aren't recorded. I flagged that as the one thing worth five minutes. Everything else (16 files, clean attribution, no intake, no active program) needs nothing. Updated standing_intent to carry this forward.

events.text: The
workspace is in good shape. Here's what actually warrants your attention tomorrow

:

---

**One thing with a real deadline:

the $19 pricing tier.**

You
recorded on July 7th that you're holding the
$19 tier until August — no change before then. That's less than four
weeks away. When you come back tomorrow, the right move is to decide
whether you want a reminder set for early August, or to think through *
what* you're evaluating when August arrives (raise,
hold again, retire the tier entirely). Right
now `operation/decisions/q3-pricing.md` just says "revisit in August" with no criteria.
If you add even one sentence about what would make you change it

, that note will be worth having when August comes.

**Everything else is quiet

— nothing broken, nothing piling up.**

- No platforms
connected, no agents running, no intake to place. The

scaffold is clean and ready.
- All 16 files are

correctly attributed. Nothing anomalous.
- No programs activated
— this is still a bare stewardship workspace.
So tomorrow: five minutes on the pricing decision —
either add your revisit criteria to that file
, or let me set an August reminder. That's the only
live thread.

input.old_string:
## Notes from this wake

Operator asked for a cleanup check. Workspace is clean — 16 files, all correctly attributed, nothing unplaced. The Q3 pricing decision (`operation/decisions/q3-pricing.md`, operator-authored) is the only operational content. No integrations, agents, or active program. Scaffold ready for program activation whenever the operator chooses.

Previous wake: Operator recorded a Q3 pricing decision: hold the $19 tier until August. Placed at `operation/decisions/q3-pricing.md`, attributed to operator.
